mapper.select:
SELECT U.id , U.name, U.idno , SUBSTRING(L.e_date,1,4) + '-' + SUBSTRING(L.e_date,5,2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(L.e_date,7,2) + ' ' + SUBSTRING(L.e_time,1,2) + ':' + SUBSTRING(L.e_time,3,2) + ':' + SUBSTRING(L.e_time,5,2) AS date, L.e_mode FROM dbo.tuser U CROSS APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 E.e_date, E.e_time, E.e_mode FROM dbo.tenter E WHERE E.e_id = U.id AND E.e_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY E.e_date DESC, E.e_time DESC ) L WHERE U.name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND U.idno LIKE '%' + #{id} + '%'
AND L.e_mode IN
#{mode}
GROUP BY U.id , U.name, U.idno , L.e_date, L.e_time,L.e_mode ORDER BY U.name

SELECT E.e_date ,LEFT(E.e_time, 4) AS e_time, U.idno AS g_id,E.e_mode FROM dbo.tenter E JOIN dbo.tuser U ON E.e_id = U.id JOIN dbo.tgate G ON G.id = E.g_id WHERE U.idno = #{id} AND ( CAST(E.e_date AS VARCHAR(8)) + LEFT(RIGHT('000000' + CAST(E.e_time AS VARCHAR(6)), 6), 4) ) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY E.e_date, E.e_time
